description: Routing strategy configuration. How VibePilot decides WHERE to send tasks. Fully configurable per user preference.

kimi_priority.name: Kimi Priority (Until Feb 27)
kimi_priority.description: Maximize Kimi subscription usage before $0.99 promo ends. Expires Feb 27, then $19/mo.

web_first.name: Web First (Strategic Intelligence)
web_first.description: Prioritize web platforms for free access + model intelligence gathering. Learns real-world model performance. Advises on subscriptions.
rationale: Best models free on web platforms
New models available immediately for testing
Real-world performance data informs subscription decisions
ROI: does free web + cheap API key beat subscriptions?

subscription_first.name: Subscription First
subscription_first.description: Use paid subscriptions exclusively. Web and API as fallback only. Maximizes sunk value.
rationale: Already paid for subscriptions, use them

api_first.name: API First
api_first.description: Direct API access preferred. Maximum control, no browser automation overhead.

rotate.name: Rotate All
rotate.description: Round-robin through all available destinations. Maximum variety, spreads load, gathers intelligence on all.
rationale: Never hit any single rate limit

cost_optimize.name: Cost Optimize
cost_optimize.description: Always choose the cheapest option that can do the task. Pure cost minimization.

custom.name: Custom Per Task Type
custom.description: Different routing for different task types. Fine-grained control.

web.description: Web platforms via courier. Free access to best models. Rate-limited but generous.

cli.description: CLI subscriptions. Already paid. Unlimited or generous limits.

api_free.description: Free API tiers. Direct access, no browser overhead.

api_credit.description: Paid API credits. Use sparingly. Track burn rate.

throttle_defaults.description: Pace requests at 80% of rate limit. Don't hard pause, just slow down.

notes: Routing strategy is fully configurable per user preference.
web_first is default for VibePilot philosophy: learn, optimize, advise.
Intelligence gathered from web platforms informs all future decisions.
Throttling paces requests rather than hard-pausing when possible.
All routing decisions logged for ROI analysis.
